name: Norrix Gorelight
description:
Court Wizard Norrix Seeks an Apprentice

Court wizard Norrix has been summoned by the queen herself to come and investigate an intruder found on the edge of the kingdom. No one knows the girl in question...

She was found unconscious, believed to have had contact with the deceased king. But when Norrix recognizes the girl in question, he is stunned.
creator: Yoshidayu
